nasb.text: You shall put it beneath, under the ledge of the altar, so that the net will reach halfway up the altar.

esv.text: And you shall set it under the ledge of the altar so that the net extends halfway down the altar.

cnv.text: 要把網安在祭壇下面的圍腰板之下，使網從下面直達到祭壇的半腰。

ccb.text: 铜网在祭坛围边的下方，向下伸展到祭坛的腰部。
